name: Peach Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1 cup skim milk, at room temperature
2 cups peaches, sliced (I used fresh and canned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare an 8 x 8-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine 1 cup sugar, flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Blend in milk and melted margarine.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
6. In another mixing bowl, combine 1/4 cup sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, and peaches. Toss to coat evenly.
7. Spoon peach mixture evenly over the batter.
8. Bake for 45 minutes or until lightly browned. If desired, serve with ice cream.
